◆ addSegmentsWithValNo()

void addSegmentsWithValNo ( LiveRange & Dst,
VNInfo * DstValNo,
const LiveRange & Src,
const VNInfo * SrcValNo )
static

Copy segements with value number SrcValNo from liverange Src to live range @Dst and use value number DstValNo there.
